Title: Setup project structure and dependencies
Description: Create the loadtest package directory structure with __init__.py files. Update requirements.txt to include aiohttp, click, rich, pytest-asyncio, and pyyaml. Create placeholder files for all main modules.

Title: Implement configuration manager
Description: Create loadtest/config.py with a Config class that handles default values, validation, and parsing of test parameters. Include support for URL, method, requests count, concurrency level, timeout, headers, and body. Write tests in tests/test_config.py.

Title: Implement metrics collector
Description: Create loadtest/metrics.py with a MetricsCollector class that stores request results and calculates statistics (min, max, mean, median, percentiles, throughput, error rate). Write tests in tests/test_metrics.py.

Title: Implement report generator
Description: Create loadtest/reporter.py with a Reporter class that formats metrics into human-readable console output using the rich library. Include summary statistics, status code distribution, and performance metrics. Write tests in tests/test_reporter.py.

Title: Implement async request engine
Description: Create loadtest/engine.py with an Engine class that uses aiohttp to execute concurrent HTTP requests. Implement async request execution with connection pooling, timeout handling, and error capture. Write tests in tests/test_engine.py using mocked responses.

Title: Implement CLI interface
Description: Create loadtest/cli.py using click to parse command-line arguments for URL, method, requests, concurrency, headers, body, timeout, and output file. Include help text and validation. Map CLI args to Config object.

Title: Create main entry point
Description: Create loadtest/__main__.py that coordinates the CLI, config, engine, metrics, and reporter. Implement the main execution flow: parse args -> run engine -> collect metrics -> generate report. Add progress display using rich.

Title: Add integration tests
Description: Create tests/test_integration.py with end-to-end tests that run the load testing tool against the existing Flask app. Test various scenarios: GET requests, POST requests, concurrent load, error handling.

Title: Create examples and update documentation
Description: Create examples/sample_config.yaml with example configuration. Update README.md with comprehensive documentation including installation, usage examples, CLI options, and interpreting results. Add a quickstart guide.

Title: Add YAML config file support
Description: Extend loadtest/config.py to support loading configuration from YAML files. Add --config CLI option to loadtest/cli.py. Update tests to cover YAML config loading. Handle merging of CLI args with config file values.
